---
title: "A1"
format: 
    html:
        theme: journal
        tocL: true
    pdf: default
author: Xuanning Zhang
---



```{r, message=FALSE}
#| include: false

library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#| include: false
raw_data <- read_csv("data/33789541_Xuanning Zhang.csv", col_names = TRUE)

tidied_data <-  raw_data |> 
    filter(!is.na(purchase_amount))

lm(purchase_amount~marketing_spend, data=tidied_data) |> 
summary()
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
ggplot(tidied_data, aes(x=marketing_spend, y=purchase_amount)) +
    geom_point()+
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se=TRUE)+
    labs(
        title="Relationship between marketing spend and purchase amount",
        x= "Marketing Spend",
        y= " Purchase Amount"
    )
```
